WebReferences.TitleEn: Minister McGuinty introduces legislation to modernize the military justice system (2025-09-26 | Department of National Defence)
WebReferences.TitleFr: Le ministre McGuinty dépose un projet de loi pour moderniser le système de justice militaire (2025-09-26 | Ministère de la Défense nationale)
WebReferences.Title: Minister McGuinty introduces legislation to modernize the military justice system (2025-09-26 | Department of National Defence)

WebReferences.TitleEn: Reintroduction of the Military Justice System Modernization Act (2025-09-26 | Department of National Defence)
WebReferences.TitleFr: Nouvelle présentation de la Loi modernisant le système de justice militaire (2025-09-26 | Ministère de la Défense nationale)
WebReferences.Title: Reintroduction of the Military Justice System Modernization Act (2025-09-26 | Department of National Defence)

WebReferences.Title: Canada. Department of National Defence. (n.d.). Independent External Comprehensive Review. https://www.canada.ca/en/department-national-defence/services/conduct-and-culture/independent-external-comprehensive-review.html [Website]

WebReferences.TitleEn: Charter Statement - Bill C-11: An Act to amend the National Defence Act and other Acts (Military Justice System Modernization Act) (Tabled 2025-10-31)
WebReferences.TitleFr: Énoncé concernant la Charte - Projet de loi C-11 : Loi modifiant la Loi sur la défense nationale et d’autres lois (Loi sur la modernisation du système de justice militaire) (Déposé 2025-10-31)
WebReferences.Title: Charter Statement - Bill C-11: An Act to amend the National Defence Act and other Acts (Military Justice System Modernization Act) (Tabled 2025-10-31)

WebReferences.TitleEn: Arbour, Louise, C.C., G.O.Q. Report of the Independent External Comprehensive Review of the Department of National Defence and the Canadian Armed Forces. 20 May 2022.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Arbour, Louise, C.C., G.O.Q. Rapport de l’examen externe indépendant et complet du ministère de la Défense nationale et des Forces armées canadiennes. Le 20 mai 2022.
WebReferences.Title: Arbour, Louise, C.C., G.O.Q. Report of the Independent External Comprehensive Review of the Department of National Defence and the Canadian Armed Forces. 20 May 2022.

WebReferences.TitleEn: Department of National Defence. “Canada’s Military Justice System.” Welcome Package for the Minister of National Defence – May 13, 2025.
WebReferences.TitleFr: Ministère de la Défense nationale. « Le système de justice militaire du Canada. » Dossier de bienvenue pour le ministre de la Défense nationale – 13 mai 2025.
WebReferences.Title: Department of National Defence. “Canada’s Military Justice System.” Welcome Package for the Minister of National Defence – May 13, 2025.

WebReferences.TitleEn: Government of Canada Strengthens Military Justice System Through Royal Assent of Bill C-11 (2025-06-19 | Department of National Defence)
WebReferences.TitleFr: Le gouvernement du Canada renforce le système de justice militaire grâce à la sanction royale du projet de loi C-11 (2025-06-19 | Ministère de la Défense nationale)
WebReferences.Title: Government of Canada Strengthens Military Justice System Through Royal Assent of Bill C-11 (2025-06-19 | Department of National Defence)

WebReferences.TitleEn: Bill C-11 Receives Royal Assent, Bringing New Military Justice Reforms into Force (2025-06-19 | Department of National Defence)
WebReferences.TitleFr: Le projet de loi C-11 reçoit la sanction royale, entraînant la mise en œuvre de nouvelles réformes visant le système de justice militaire (2025-06-19 | Ministère de la Défense nationale)
WebReferences.Title: Bill C-11 Receives Royal Assent, Bringing New Military Justice Reforms into Force (2025-06-19 | Department of National Defence)
